name: threetreecity
overridesNotes: postcss is pinned to a patched version inside Next's nested deps until Next ships a release that bumps it. Advisory GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93 is an XSS via </style> in CSS Stringify output — only exploitable when stringifying untrusted CSS, which we don't do, but the override clears the audit warning for Vercel's scanner.
